sourcePolicy: Public-safe generalized heuristic. Contains no extracted assets, paths, names, proprietary values, or private reports.

cards.title: Modular RPG Costume Slot System
cards.summary: For long-term RPG cosmetics, model outfits as composable slots rather than single images.
designRules: Separate silhouette, garment, accessory, aura, and rarity-effect layers.
Create a preview scene and ownership state for paid fashion.
Use rarity VFX sparingly to avoid visual clutter.
cards.mgaiUsage: Generate CostumeSlotSpec with slot roles, rarity treatment, preview state, ownership state, and fallback rendering.

cards.title: Artifact Visual Identity Loop
cards.summary: Important RPG artifacts should have a consistent identity across inventory, detail view, equipped state, and skill feedback.
designRules: Give each artifact family a clear silhouette and motion motif.
Separate icon readability from full-screen reveal impact.
Use upgrade and awakening states as visual milestones.
cards.mgaiUsage: Generate ArtifactVisualSpec with icon rules, detail card layout, equipped pose, skill feedback, and upgrade milestones.

cards.title: High-Value Scene Painting Brief
cards.summary: High-value feature entrances benefit from scene briefs that define subject, mood, camera, UI-safe areas, and motion layers.
designRules: Reserve illustrated scene treatment for major milestones and premium entry points.
Define UI-safe areas before producing art.
Separate ambient motion layers from core UI interaction layers.
cards.mgaiUsage: Generate ScenePaintingBrief with subject, mood, camera angle, safe areas, palette, and motion layer notes.
